description: Firefox login data parser reads logins.json and emits BrowserEvent per saved login — passwords NEVER exposed
steps: Read file as serde_json::Value, iterate logins array
Each login: hostname, formSubmitURL, usernameField, timeCreated (i64 ms since Unix epoch)
Description: hostname. Attrs: hostname, form_submit_url, username_field
CRITICAL: always set attrs['password'] = json!('ENCRYPTED'). Never read encryptedPassword.
Test: write test logins.json to NamedTempFile
Test: parse_empty_logins_returns_empty — empty logins array yields empty vec
Test: ff_login_emits_hostname — attrs['hostname'] correct, ts_ns = timeCreated * 1_000_000
